termsContent.welcomeText: Welcome to OnClickWise! These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern the use of the OnClickWise platform ("Platform", "service"), including registration, access and use by corporate users. By creating an account, using or accessing the Platform, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree with any part, do not use the Platform.
termsContent.section1Intro: For the purposes of these Terms:
termsContent.section1User: User: any individual who represents a company and registers on the Platform.
termsContent.section1Company: Client Company or Company: legal entity registered on the Platform through the User.
termsContent.section1RegistrationData: Registration Data: data you provide at registration, including but not limited to: Company name, Slug, EIN, Company email, Phone, Full address (ZIP, city, state, country), Password / password confirmation, Responsible name, Responsible email, Responsible position, Responsible SSN.
termsContent.section1Services: Services: all functionalities offered by the OnClickWise Platform, including CRM, lead management, company information viewing, etc.
termsContent.section2Item1: To use the Platform services, you must provide complete and true Registration Data.
termsContent.section2Item2: You declare that the Registration Data, especially Legal Entity (company) and Individual (responsible) are correct, updated and that you have authorization to provide them.
termsContent.section2Item3: It is the User's obligation to keep this information updated. In case of relevant change (for example change of responsible, new SSN, address etc.), the User must update the data on the Platform.
termsContent.section3Item1: Upon completing registration, you will choose a password. You are responsible for maintaining password confidentiality.
termsContent.section3Item2: You agree to immediately notify OnClickWise of any unauthorized use of your account or any other security breach.
termsContent.section3Item3: OnClickWise will not be responsible for losses or damages arising from misuse of your account, unless resulting from proven serious failure on OnClickWise's part.
termsContent.section4Title: 4. Collection, use and processing of personal data
termsContent.section4Intro: Personal data (responsible name, email, SSN, etc.) collected is used for: company user identification, security, service provision and maintenance, support, account-related communication, compliance with legal and regulatory obligations.
termsContent.section4Item1: OnClickWise is committed to respecting the General Data Protection Law – Law No. 13.709/2018 ("LGPD") in the processing of personal data.
termsContent.section4Item2: Data will be stored in a secure environment, with reasonable technical and administrative measures to protect against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration or destruction.
termsContent.section4Item3: OnClickWise will not share your personal data with third parties, except when necessary to comply with legal obligation, court order, or with express consent, or for the execution of contracted services that depend on third parties, who are obliged to maintain confidentiality.

privacyContent.introText: OnClickWise values your privacy and the protection of your personal data. This Privacy Policy clearly explains how we collect, use, store, share and protect information provided by users and companies that use our platform.
privacyContent.agreementText: By registering or using the Platform, you agree to the practices described below.
privacyContent.section1Intro: During registration and use of the Platform, we may collect the following data:
privacyContent.section2Item1: Identify and authenticate companies and registration responsible.
privacyContent.section2Item2: Allow access and use of the Platform (CRM, lead capture, information management).
privacyContent.section2Item3: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations.
privacyContent.section2Item4: Perform administrative and operational communication with users.
privacyContent.section2Item5: Improve our services, fix failures, implement new features.
privacyContent.section2Item6: Protect Platform security and prevent fraud.
privacyContent.section2Item7: Send relevant communications (only with prior consent for marketing communications).
privacyContent.section3Intro1: Your data is not sold or shared with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacyContent.section3Intro2: We may share your data only in the following cases:
privacyContent.section3Item1: With service providers and partners who act on behalf of OnClickWise (e.g., hosting providers, technical support), always under confidentiality obligation.
privacyContent.section3Item2: To comply with legal, regulatory obligations or comply with court orders.
privacyContent.section3Item3: To protect rights, security or property of OnClickWise, users or third parties.
privacyContent.section4Item1: Data is stored on secure servers, located in Brazil or abroad, as per applicable legislation.
privacyContent.section4Item3: We apply technical and administrative measures to protect against unauthorized access, losses, destruction or improper alteration.
privacyContent.section4Item4: Despite our efforts, no system is 100% secure. In case of security incident that may affect your data, we will notify you as required by LGPD.
privacyContent.section5Item1: We will keep data while your account is active or as necessary to provide our services.
privacyContent.section5Item2: After account deletion request, data will be deleted or anonymized, except if there is need for retention due to legal or regulatory obligation.
privacyContent.section6Intro: According to the General Data Protection Law (Law No. 13.709/2018 – LGPD), you have the right to:
privacyContent.section6Item1: Confirm if we process your personal data.
privacyContent.section6Item2: Access personal data we have about you.
privacyContent.section6Item3: Correct incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data.
privacyContent.section6Item4: Request anonymization, blocking or elimination of unnecessary or excessive data.
privacyContent.section6Item5: Request data portability to another provider.
privacyContent.section6Item6: Request deletion of data processed based on consent.
privacyContent.section6Item8: Obtain information about who we share your data with.
privacyContent.section6Contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at: [OnClickWise contact email].

Hero.tag: It has never been so simple!
Hero.title: Simplify. Automate.
Hero.subtitle: Manage leads, contacts, companies, deals, tasks and teams — all in one powerful platform. Designed to streamline your sales process and help you close more deals effortlessly.

About.title: About OnclickWise
About.description: OnclickWise is a cutting-edge SaaS platform where you can manage your entire business in one place. Optimize lead capture, customer management, team organization, task scheduling, and oversee your company's sales and marketing performance. Powered with modern technologies and AI integration, it fully automates your operational workflow and scales with your growth.
About.footer: Our innovation is dedicated to you.

Features.title: Powerful tools made simple
Features.subtitle: OnclickWise combines cutting-edge AI technology with a clean, intuitive experience — giving your business everything it needs in a single platform.

Faqs.title: Everything you need to know about

whatIs.question: What is OnclickWise?
whatIs.answer: OnclickWise is a cutting-edge SaaS platform that centralizes your business operations, from leads to sales and team management.

dataSecure.question: Is my data secure?
dataSecure.answer: Yes! We use modern encryption and security protocols to ensure that your business data is always safe.

integrations.question: Can I integrate with other tools?
integrations.answer: Absolutely. OnclickWise integrates with popular CRMs, email marketing tools, and project management platforms.

support.question: Do you offer customer support?
support.answer: Yes, our support team is available 24/7 to help you with onboarding, troubleshooting, and best practices.

CallToAction.title: Boost your productivity today
CallToAction.description: Start your free trial and experience the power of simplified management with all the tools your team needs.

Footer.description: Centralize your operations, accelerate your workflow and grow with a modern platform built for performance.
